raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX I logged into my Citi Bank XXXX to view my balance and pay the {$99.00} bill for my credit cards annual fee. Upon logging in, I noticed a XXXX balance transfer was initiated on XX/XX/year>. I did not request this balance transfer. 

On XX/XX/year> at XXXX XXXX I called Citi credit card XXXX XXXX XXXX ) department and reported the transaction as fraudulent. They informed me that the balance transfer sent to a checking account, which I did not open, with Citi Bank in my name. Then a couple days later {$7200.00} of that balance was transferred again to another Citi Bank account to an individual I do not know. 

I then called Citis Banks Banking fraud ( XXXX ) department on XX/XX/year> at XXXX ; XXXX XXXX and reported the checking account that I did not create as fraudulent and had the account blocked. 

Since then, I have called Citi Banks credit card fraud department on XX/XX/year> at XXXX XXXX to confirm that theyd submitted my credit card fraud claim as it wasnt showing as a disputed charge in my app. They informed me that it would now show as disputed because a new card had been issued.
